# WireSizing.com

> Wire gauge reference and sizing calculator. Free, ad-supported reference site with data calculated from ASTM B258 (AWG formulas), NEC Table 310.16 (ampacity), and IEC 60228 (metric sizes).

## AWG Wire Gauge Chart
- [Full AWG Chart](https://wiresizing.com/awg/): All 44 AWG sizes from 4/0 to 40
- Individual pages for each gauge: /awg/14/, /awg/12/, /awg/4-0/, etc.
- Each page includes: diameter (mm/inches/mils), area (mm²/circular mils), resistance (Ω/km, Ω/1000ft) for copper and aluminum, ampacity at 60/75/90°C, weight, skin depth, common uses, insulation types

## Metric Wire Sizes (IEC 60228)
- [Metric Chart](https://wiresizing.com/metric/): 19 standard sizes from 0.5 mm² to 300 mm²
- Individual pages: /metric/2.5mm2/, /metric/4mm2/, /metric/10mm2/, etc.
- Includes ampacity, resistance, weight, closest AWG equivalent

## Wire Size by Amperage
- [Amp Lookup](https://wiresizing.com/what-size/): 15A through 200A
- Pages like /what-size/30-amp/, /what-size/50-amp/
- Shows recommended copper and aluminum wire gauge per NEC Table 310.16

## Appliance Wiring Guides
- [All Appliances](https://wiresizing.com/appliances/): 13 guides
- Dryer, water heater, stove, air conditioner, hot tub, EV charger, welder, well pump, pool pump, microwave, dishwasher, garage, bathroom
- Each includes: wire size, breaker, voltage, typical amps, NEC reference, max distance

## Ampacity Tables
- [NEC 310.16](https://wiresizing.com/ampacity/): Copper at 60/75/90°C, aluminum at 75°C

## Distance & Voltage Drop
- [Distance Charts](https://wiresizing.com/distance/): 60 pages
- Combinations of 10 common gauges × 6 distances (25, 50, 75, 100, 150, 200 ft)
- Voltage drop at 120V and 240V for multiple amperages

## Conversions
- [AWG to mm²](https://wiresizing.com/convert/awg-to-mm2/)
- [mm² to AWG](https://wiresizing.com/convert/mm2-to-awg/)

## Comparisons
- [Copper vs Aluminum](https://wiresizing.com/compare/copper-vs-aluminum/)
- [Solid vs Stranded](https://wiresizing.com/compare/solid-vs-stranded/)

## Wire Materials
- [Materials](https://wiresizing.com/materials/): Copper, aluminum, silver, gold, nickel, nichrome, steel, tinned copper — with resistivity, density, temp coefficient

## Application Guides
- [Home Wiring](https://wiresizing.com/guides/home-wiring/)
- [Automotive](https://wiresizing.com/guides/automotive/)
- [Solar](https://wiresizing.com/guides/solar/)
- [Marine](https://wiresizing.com/guides/marine/)
- [Speaker Wire](https://wiresizing.com/guides/speaker-wire/)
- [EV Charging](https://wiresizing.com/guides/ev-charging/)

## Calculator
- [Wire Size Calculator](https://wiresizing.com/calculator/): Enter amps, voltage, distance, material, phase — get recommended wire gauge with voltage drop calculation

## Key Formulas
- AWG diameter: d(n) = 0.005 × 92^((36-n)/39) inches
- Area: A = π/4 × d²
- Resistance: R = ρ × L / A
- Voltage drop (single phase): Vdrop = 2 × I × R × L
- Voltage drop (three phase): Vdrop = √3 × I × R × L

## Contact
- info@wiresizing.com
